name: Elder Care
description: Coordinate care for a loved one: a visit rotation, shared care tasks, appointment notes, and an observation log the whole care circle can see.

source.query: SELECT id AS id, title AS title, CASE WHEN time = '' THEN date ELSE date || 'T' || time END AS when_at, NULLIF(provider, '') AS subtitle, NULLIF(accompanied_by_id, '') AS member_id FROM app_elder_care__appointments WHERE date = :today ORDER BY time LIMIT 20

SELECT id AS id, title AS title, due_date AS when_at, (status = 'done') AS done, NULLIF(detail, '') AS subtitle, NULLIF(assignee_id, '') AS member_id FROM app_elder_care__tasks WHERE due_date = :today ORDER BY status, created_at LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM app_elder_care__tasks WHERE status = 'open' LIMIT 1
